source: OKX published fee schedule (2026-04-08 revision); cross-checked at https://www.jacktrader.xyz/en/blog/okx-vip-fee-tiers-2026.html

qualification.rule: VIP tier is the better of: 30-day trading volume OR asset balance held on platform (dual qualification — unique vs Binance volume-only ladder)
qualification.note: One shared VIP level covers spot and futures, with separate fee schedules per market

discounts.okb: OKB holdings are woven into tier/holdings qualification rather than a flat fee toggle

rebate.note: Sub-broker rebate of up to 40% of the net fee, stacks on top of any VIP tier; depends on partner tier and platform policy, not guaranteed
